<reflection>the transformation pattern involves inserting the specified word (with its surrounding spaces) immediately after every occurrence of the target word. for the given sentence, " top " is added after each "timmy", resulting in "timmy" being replaced by "timmy top " while preserving the rest of the sentence structure.</reflection>
